candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Not current assets; opposite classification.
Balancing row, not the reported total.
Balancing row and non-current, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Balance sheet cash line; best match for cash and cash equivalents in absence of a more explicit BS label.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end
candidates.why: Cash flow ending balance, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning
candidates.why: Beginning cash balance, not the balance sheet target.
Operating cash generation, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Development in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Change in cash, not ending cash balance.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet cash line; values reconcile to cash and cash equivalents at the end in the cash flow statement.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Wrong maturity bucket.
Balancing row, not the reported total.
Balancing row and non-current.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Current maturities of long-term debt; clearly short-term debt excluding leases and matches the non-lease current debt line.
Interest payable is not debt principal; should be excluded from STD.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Cleaner directly reported non-lease current debt line; same concept as candidate and preferable wording for baseline STD.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Chose the explicit non-lease current debt row. Did not include lease rows or duplicate the equivalent maturity breakdown line to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Best available balance-sheet aggregate for property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets.
Balancing row, not total PPE.
Balancing row, not reported total.
Wrong asset class for PPE.

variables.notes: IFRS filers often present total tangible assets rather than a line explicitly labeled property, plant and equipment; this is the best total/net PPE proxy available.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.
Equal total by accounting identity, but not the asset label requested.
Only a component of total assets.
Only a component of total assets.

variables.notes: Chose outside shortlist because no AT candidates were provided; confident exact total assets label.

candidates.why: Exact net operating cash flow line; best match for OANCF.
Pre-tax/interest operating cash generation subtotal, not the final net cash from operations.

candidates.row_label: Cash Generated from Operations - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, not the reported cash flow total.

variables.notes: Selected outside shortlist because it is the explicit net cash flow from operating activities line, preferable to the subtotal 'Cash Generated from Operations'.
